rationale: The cited paper appears substantively relevant to the citing paper’s mechanism focus: the citing study models store switching and timing effects of promotions across retailers, while the cited study directly analyzes temporal and spatial price search/cherry-picking and retailer profit consequences in grocery settings. This overlap suggests the cited work could plausibly serve as a mechanism or foundational reference rather than a purely incidental mention. With an exact DOI match present, this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
